title: AliExpress Products Scraper Input
description: Search AliExpress for public product catalog and price data. For a low-cost test, use one query, maxResults 5-10, maxPagesPerQuery 1, and residential proxy.

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: One or more product searches. Start with one query for a low-cost test. Duplicate products are removed across queries.

maxResults.title: Maximum products
maxResults.description: Maximum unique product records saved across all searches. Use 5-10 for test runs; increase only after results look correct.

maxPagesPerQuery.title: Pages per query
maxPagesPerQuery.description: Maximum AliExpress result pages opened for each query. Use 1 page for test runs to control proxy and compute usage.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential US proxies are recommended because AliExpress blocks direct/datacenter traffic. Proxy traffic is billed as platform usage.
